title: BSNC Announces 2021 Shareholder Dividend and Elder Dividend
summary: The Bering Straits Native Corporation (BSNC) Board of Directors has declared a record-high dividend of $9.50 per share, a 14% increase more than the 2020 shareholder dividend. This dividend will be paid to shareholders (on record as of Nov. 29) by Dec. 31. Shareholders who own an average of 100 shar...
